brief: Domain spotlight (lore intro) for the Kronos realm in VOIDBORN. Visual identity: ancient stone, granite, moss, earth magic, golden amber accents, titanic golems and druids. Lore themes: tanks, siege units, stone golems, rootbound druids, mountain fortresses. Describe the realm's culture, bastions, and role in the war against the Aether Bleed / Void corruption. Tease iconic units and the feeling of playing Kronos decks. City backdrop sets the mood. Instagram punchy + hashtags including #Kronos; Facebook epic lore story + community question; Discord markdown realm guide + play link https://voidborn.fun.

image.prompt: 1:1 cinematic shot of a massive, ancient granite golem covered in glowing golden amber runes and thick green moss, standing before a towering stone fortress gate, epic dark fantasy, soft golden hour lighting, hyper-detailed, atmospheric, volumetric fog, no text.
